LanguageData.FCP_Nuka_Cola.description: A standard Nuka-Cola in its iconic bottle. Provides refreshment and a mild stimulant effect from the unique blend of ingredients.
LanguageData.FCP_Nuka_Cola.label: nuka-cola bottle
LanguageData.FCP_Nuka_Cola_Can.description: Nuka-Cola in a convenient aluminum can. Same great taste and energy boost as the bottled version, but easier to stack and transport.
LanguageData.FCP_Nuka_Cola_Can.label: nuka-cola can
LanguageData.FCP_Nuka_Cola_Cherry.description: A cherry-flavored variant of Nuka-Cola. The added fruit flavoring provides slight health benefits along with the signature energy boost. Particularly popular before the war.
LanguageData.FCP_Nuka_Cola_Cherry.label: nuka-cola cherry
LanguageData.FCP_Nuka_Cola_Classic.description: The standard Nuka-Cola that took the world by storm before the war. This sweet, carbonated beverage provides a quick energy boost and a small amount of joy. The distinctive rocket-shaped bottle is instantly recognizable.
LanguageData.FCP_Nuka_Cola_Classic.label: nuka-cola
LanguageData.FCP_Nuka_Cola_Cranberry.description: A tart cranberry-flavored Nuka-Cola variant. The berry tang balances the sweetness, giving a pleasant, slightly acidic bite favored in holiday marketing campaigns.
LanguageData.FCP_Nuka_Cola_Cranberry.label: nuka-cranberry
LanguageData.FCP_Nuka_Cola_Dark.description: A rum-flavored alcoholic Nuka-Cola variant. Combines the stimulant effects of Nuka-Cola with alcohol, resulting in unique but potentially risky effects. Popular with adventurous drinkers.
LanguageData.FCP_Nuka_Cola_Dark.label: nuka-dark
LanguageData.FCP_Nuka_Cola_Grape.description: A grape-flavored Nuka-Cola variant with a distinctive purple hue. The grape flavoring adds a sweet taste while maintaining the energizing properties of standard Nuka-Cola.
LanguageData.FCP_Nuka_Cola_Grape.label: nuka-cola grape
LanguageData.FCP_Nuka_Cola_Ice_Cold.description: A chilled variant of Nuka-Cola. Cold, crisp, and refreshing â€” a pre-war marketing hit. Said to be made by a special cold-fermentation process that gives it a sharper fizz and a brisk, invigorating kick.
LanguageData.FCP_Nuka_Cola_Ice_Cold.label: nuka-cola (ice cold)
LanguageData.FCP_Nuka_Cola_Orange.description: An orange-flavored Nuka-Cola with hints of citrus. The vitamin content from orange flavoring provides minor immune system benefits alongside the energizing effects.
LanguageData.FCP_Nuka_Cola_Orange.label: nuka-cola orange
LanguageData.FCP_Nuka_Cola_Quantum.description: The rare and potent Nuka-Cola Quantum, featuring a blue glow from mild radioactive isotopes. Provides a massive energy boost but with potential health risks. Highly sought after for its extreme effects.
LanguageData.FCP_Nuka_Cola_Quantum.label: nuka-cola quantum
LanguageData.FCP_Nuka_Cola_Quartz.description: A rare desert-region variant with a distinctive clear appearance and enhanced formula. Provides superior refreshment and energy in harsh conditions.
LanguageData.FCP_Nuka_Cola_Quartz.label: nuka-cola quartz
LanguageData.FCP_Nuka_Cola_Rum.description: A stronger rum variant of Nuka-Cola with higher alcohol content. Less carbonation, more kick. Provides significant intoxication with mild stimulant effects.
LanguageData.FCP_Nuka_Cola_Rum.label: nuka-rum
LanguageData.FCP_Nuka_Cola_Twist.description: A citrus-twisted variant of Nuka-Cola with bright lemon-lime notes. Popular for its zesty tang and slightly higher perceived refreshment.
LanguageData.FCP_Nuka_Cola_Twist.label: nuka-twist
LanguageData.FCP_Nuka_Cola_Victory.description: A premium pre-war variant celebrating military victories. Enhanced with additional stimulants and a superior taste. Commands a high price for its exceptional effects.
LanguageData.FCP_Nuka_Cola_Victory.label: nuka-cola victory
LanguageData.FCP_Nuka_Cola_Wild.description: A wild berry flavored Nuka-Cola with an aggressive marketing campaign. The exotic fruit blend provides enhanced taste and a solid energy boost.
LanguageData.FCP_Nuka_Cola_Wild.label: nuka-cola wild
LanguageData.FCP_Nuka_Fridge.description: A specialized cold fermentation cabinet used by Nuka-Cola bottling teams to create the Ice Cold variant. Works like a fermenting barrel but maintains cooler temperatures for a crisper product.
LanguageData.FCP_Nuka_Fridge.label: nuka-cola fridge
LanguageData.FCP_Nukashine.description: A powerful homebrewed alcoholic concoction made with Nuka-Cola as a base. Extremely potent and unpredictable, it can cause memory loss and blackouts. Only the desperate or foolhardy consume this regularly.
LanguageData.FCP_Nukashine.label: nukashine
